item.title: Japan reclassifies crypto as financial assets, enabling spot Bitcoin ETFs and imposing stricter disclosure rules from 2027
White House plans high-level meeting with senators to resolve remaining CLARITY Act ethics provisions
Ostium loses $18M in oracle attack after manipulated price-feed timestamps triggered erroneous USDC payouts from protocol vault
GENIUS Act stablecoin rulebook deadline set for July 18, determining which issuers meet U.S. operating requirements
SEC plans to propose crypto rulemaking this month granting regulatory exemptions for tokenized securities and digital fundraising
Circle receives OCC approval for national trust bank to offer federally supervised digital asset custody
Morgan Stanley receives conditional OCC approval to establish a national trust bank for digital asset custody and staking
Swift runs live blockchain tests with 17 banks including Citi, HSBC and UBS for 24/7 tokenized deposit settlements
MiCA enforcement begins: approximately 80% of EU crypto firms lack valid authorization as transition period closes
JPMorgan Q1 2026 filings show Bitcoin ETF holdings expanded up to 900% across Fidelity and Bitwise funds
U.S. agencies propose bank-grade customer identification requirements for stablecoin issuers under GENIUS Act
U.S. and UK regulators outline joint framework to align stablecoin reserve and tokenization standards
Security researchers disclose patched Aptos blockchain flaw that could have put $70B in digital assets at systemic risk
